name: tno
description: Thread-scoped markdown notes for coding agents, backed by the tno CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Use tno notes before edits and record durable decisions.
interface.longDescription: Thread Notes teaches Codex to use the tno CLI as thread-scoped margin notes: read file notes before editing, search prior decisions with ripgrep, and append durable decisions after they are accepted.
defaultPrompt: Use thread notes while editing this repo
